title: Ordinary Differential Equations (2OD)

prerequisites.text: MAM1031F and MAM1032S or equivalent; MAM1043H and MAM1044H.

outline: Topics include: first-order equations; existence and uniqueness of solutions; linear equations of the n-th order; systems of n linear first-order equations; non-homogeneous linear equations and systems; variation of parameters; qualitative theory of non-linear equations; phase plane analysis; externally- and parametrically-driven oscillators; resonance; application to the theory of non-linear vibrations; and calculus of variations.
dp_requirements: A class record of 30% or more; satisfactory attendance at lectures and tutorials; submission of all assigned work.
assessment: Class record counts up to 50%; the balance is made up by the final examination.
